violations.text: The hand-washing sink at the food counter was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the retail walk-in cooler doors in front of the bottled water and the red bull drinks. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk-in cooler door entrance from the sales floor and the 1-door reach-in freezer in the back room. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
